title: STEINS;GATE 0
notes: Performs first launch installation. Does not start beyond a small black square

title: STEINS;GATE 0
notes: Same problem of Wine, a console opens for a second and the game closes by itself. Probably the workaround used in Wine works but I don't know how to use it with Proton (https://appdb.winehq.org/objectManager.php?sClass=version&iId=37086)

title: STEINS;GATE 0
notes:
Proton can't execute BAT files, for this you must to copy the launcher as the boot.bat (yes, using the bat extension) and set as steam launch parameters: EN

Also you must to disable your joysticks launching the system32\control.exe manually using proton and their STEAM_COMPAT_DATA_PATH

title: STEINS;GATE 0
notes: Using previous completely stable entry tips, managed to get launcher to run by pressing "Play" on steam, however, after clicking "Start Game" in launcher, game fails to run and crashes

gpu: X.Org AMD Radeon (TM) RX 480 Graphics (POLARIS10, DRM 3.26.0, 4.18.6-1-MANJARO, LLVM 6.0.1)
notes: Rename "launcher.exe" to boot.bat, after that the game runs perfectly for me. Ran on Manjaro Linux.
title: STEINS;GATE 0

notes: Was able to get the game to run perfectly after renaming "launcher.exe" to "boot.bat" in the "~/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/STEINS;GATE 0" folder. After that, I set launch parameter to "EN" in Steam, and the game launches successfully from the Steam client. Prior to these steps, the game would not launch.
